Buoc 1: Lien he bo phan Giai quyet Boi thuong qua tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de trinh bay noi dung khiáº¿u náº¡i.
Buoc 2: Cung cap cac thong tin: ho so boi thuong, ma ho so, ten nguoi duoc bao hiem, ngay gay ro va ly do khong dong y.
Buoc 3: Nhan vien tiep nhan se ghi nhan va chuyen den bo phon xu ly trong thoi gian 3-5 ngay lam viec.
Buoc 4: Anh/chá»‹ se nhan duoc phan hoi bang van ban hoac cuoc goi tu truong boi boi thuong.
Neu khong nhan duoc phan hoi, vui long lien he lai tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac gui email den @petrolimex.com.vn.

category.pattern: TOI KHONG DONG Y VOI KET QUA BOI THUONG
category.template:
Neu anh/chá»‹ khong dong y voi ket qua boi thuong, vui long thuc hien theo quy trinh khieu nai sau day:
1. Lien he bo phan Giai quyet Boi thuong qua tong dai 1900 54 54 55.
2. Cung cap ma ho so, ket qua boi thuong hien tai va ly do khong dong y.
3. Ho so se duoc xem xet lai boi truong boi boi thuong trong thoi gian 5-7 ngay lam viec.
4. Ket qua xet xet lai se duoc thong bao cho anh/chá»‹ bang van ban.
Anh/chá»‹ cung co the gui email khieu nai den @petrolimex.com.vn hoac den dia chi Tang 21-22, toa nha Mipec, 229 Tay Son, phuong Kim Lien, Ha Noi.

De yeu cau dung ky hoac cham dut hop dong bao hiem, anh/chá»‹ vui long thuc hien:
1. Lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac den truc tiep van phong gan nhat.
2. Dinh kem yeu cau ghi ro ly do dung ky hop dong.
3. se tien hanh hieu chinh hoac cham dut hop dong theo quy dinh tai san pham va luat bao hiem.
Luu y: viec dung ky hop dong co the phat sinh cac khoan phi theo quy dinh cua san pham va thoa thuan cung nhu boi thuong phi da dong. Vui long tham khao chi tiet hop dong hoac hoi nhan vien tu van.

Khi anh/chá»‹ quen mat ma khoa tai khoan, vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de duoc ho tro reset ma khoa. Nhan vien se xac nhan thong tin ca nhan roi huong dan anh/chá»‹ thiet lap lai mat ma khoa moi.
De doi thong tin tai khoan hoac thong tin ca nhan, vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55. Nhan vien se xac nhan danh tinh va huong dan anh/chá»‹ cap nhat thong tin moi.

Viec doi ten tren hop dong bao hiem can thuc hien qua tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac den truc tiep van phong . Anh/chá»‹ can mang theo giay to xac nhan danh tinh (CCCD/ho chieu) va giay to lien quan den hop dong bao hiem. Nhan vien se huong dan qua trinh cap nhat.
De doi mat khau tai khoan, vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55. Nhan vien se xac nhan thong tin ca nhan roi huong dan anh/chá»‹ thiet lap mat khau moi.

Thoi gian xu ly boi thuong phu thuoc vao tung loai bao hiem va tinh chat ho so:
- Boi thuong nho, don gian: 5-7 ngay lam viec ke tu ngay nhan du day du ho so.
- Boi thuong phuc tap, can tham dinh: 15-30 ngay lam viec.
- Truong hop can xac minh them: co the keo dai hon 30 ngay, nhung se thong bao cho anh/chá»‹ tien do xu ly.
De theo doi tien do ho so, anh/chá»‹ co the lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac truy cap website https://www..com.vn.

category.pattern: XU LY BOI THUONG MAT BAO LAU
KHI NAO NHAN DUOC TIEN BOI THUONG
THOI HAN XU LY BOI THUONG
HO SO BOI THUONG CAN GI
category.template:
De lam thu tuc boi thuong, anh/chá»‹ can chuan bi cac giay to sau:
1. Giay bao hiem hoac hop dong bao hiem (ban chinh hoac ban sao).
2. Giay to xac nhan danh tinh nguoi duoc bao hiem (CCCD/ho chieu).
3. Don yeu cau boi thuong (theo mau cua ).
4. Giay to chung minh su co: benh an, giay ra vien, giay bao cong an (neu la tai nan), giay xac nhan thiet hai (neu la tai san).
5. Giay uy quyen (neu nguoi nhan boi thuong khong phai nguoi duoc bao hiem).
6. Cac giay to khac theo yeu cau cua tung loai bao hiem.
Anh/chá»‹ co the download mau don va danh sach chi tiet tai website https://www..com.vn hoac lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55.

1. Lien he ngay tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de bao cao tinh trang mat giay to.
2. Nhan vien se huong dan anh/chá»‹ thu tuc xin cap lai hoac xac nhan thay the giay to.
3. Trong mot so truong hop, anh/chá»‹ co the can den truc tiep van phong de xac nhan danh tinh va lam thu tuc bo sung.
Luu y: khong nen viec bo ho so neu thieu giay to, vi co the huong dan bo sung sau. Vui long lien he som nhat co the.

category.pattern: KHONG CON GIAY TO BOI THUONG
DONG PHI BAO HIEM O DAU
category.template:
Anh/chá»‹ co the dong phi bao hiem theo cac cach sau:
1. Chuyen khoan ngan hang: Chuyen den tai khoan cua theo thong tin tren hoa don hoac thong bao dong phi.
2. Thu tien tai nha: co dich vu thu tien tai nha (ap dung mot so khu vuc, lien he tong dai de xac nhan).
3. Dien thoai qua cong truc tiep: Truc tiep den cac van phong tren toan quoc.
4. Cong thuc qua cong (neu co): Anh/chá»‹ co the tham khao website https://www..com.vn de biet them chi tiet.
Vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 neu can ho tro.

category.pattern: TOI CO THE HUY BAO HIEM KHONG
category.template:
Co, anh/chá»‹ co the huy bao hiem theo quy dinh cua hop dong va Luat Kinh doanh Bao hiem. Tuy nhien:
- Neu huy trong thoi gian duoc huy (thuong 15-30 ngay dau ke tu ngay ky), anh/chá»‹ se duoc hoan tra toan bo phi da dong (tru phi quan ly neu co).
- Neu huy sau thoi gian duoc huy, anh/chá»‹ se duoc hoan tra phi theo bang gia tri hien tai cua hop dong (co the thap hon phi da dong).
De huy bao hiem, vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac gui don huy hop dong den van phong .

category.pattern: BAO HIEM CO DUOC CHUYEN NHUONG KHONG
category.template:
Viec chuyen nhuong hop dong bao hiem phu thuoc vao loai bao hiem va quy dinh cua tung san pham:
- Bao hiem nhan tho: Co the duoc chuyen nhuong trong mot so truong hop theo quy dinh cua Luat Kinh doanh Bao hiem.
- Bao hiem phi nhan tho: Khong duoc chuyen nhuong.
- Bao hiem tai san: Phu thuoc vao quy dinh cua hop dong.
De biet chi tiet ap dung cho hop dong cua anh/chá»‹, vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac tham khao hop dong bao hiem.

Hien tai, khong ho tro doi san pham bao hiem sau khi da ky hop dong. Tuy nhien, anh/chá»‹ co the:
1. Huy hop dong hien tai (xem quy dinh huy huy hop dong).
2. Ky hop dong moi voi san pham phu hop hon.
Vui long lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de duoc tu van chi tiet ve cac san pham phu hop voi nhu cau cua anh/chá»‹.

category.pattern: BAO HIEM CO HIEN LUC BAO LAU
category.template:
Thoi han bao hiem phu thuoc vao tung loai san pham va hop dong cu the. Anh/chá»‹ dang tham khao loai bao hiem nao?
- Bao hiem nhan tho: thoi han co the la 5, 10, 15, 20 nam hoac den mot tuoi nhat dinh.
- Bao hiem tai nan: thong thuong 1 nam, gia han nam.
- Bao hiem suc khoe: thong thuong 1 nam, gia han nam.
- Bao hiem tai san: theo thoi han thoa thuan trong hop dong.
Vui long cung cap ten san pham hoac lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de duoc huong dan chi tiet.

category.pattern: TOI CHUA NHAN DUOC GIAY CHUNG NHAN
category.template:
Neu anh/chá»‹ chua nhan duoc giay chung nhan bao hiem, vui long lam theo huong dan sau:
1. Kiem tra thoi gian: Giay chung nhan thuong duoc cap trong 5-10 ngay lam viec ke tu ngay ky hop dong.
2. Lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de kiem tra trang thai cap giay chung nhan.
3. Neu giay chung nhan da duoc gui, anh/chá»‹ se duoc cung cap so van don hoac thoi gian du kien nhan duoc.
4. Anh/chá»‹ cung co the den truc tiep van phong de nhan giay chung nhan neu can gap.

rat xin loi vi trai nghiem khong phu y cua anh/chá»‹. Chung toi luon lang nghe va cau thien de cai thien dich vu.
De chung toi co the xu ly, vui long cung cap:
1. Thoi diem va dia diem xay ra su co.
2. Noi dung khong hai long cu the.
3. Thong tin lien he cua anh/chá»‹.
Anh/chá»‹ co the goi tong dai 1900 54 54 55 hoac gui email den @petrolimex.com.vn. Chung toi se phan hoi trong thoi gian 3-5 ngay lam viec.

thanh that xin loi vi su chua phu hop cua chung toi. Anh/chá»‹ vui long chia se noi dung khong hai long de chung toi kip thua nhan va cai thien. Xin vui long goi 1900 54 54 55 hoac gui email @petrolimex.com.vn de cung cap gap y. Chung toi se phan hoi ket qua xu ly trong 3-5 ngay lam viec.

Khi anh/chá»‹ chuyen nha, vui long cap nhat lai dia chi de nhan duoc cac thong bao va giay to lien quan den hop dong bao hiem:
1. Lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55 de thong bao dia chi moi.
2. Nhan vien se xac nhan danh tinh va cap nhat thong tin tren he thong.
3. Anh/chá»‹ cung co the gui email den @petrolimex.com.vn voi noi dung: ho ten, ma hop dong, dia chi cu, dia chi moi.
4. Neu anh/chá»‹ den truc tiep, vui long mang theo CCCD/ho chieu va hop dong bao hiem.

De cap nhat so dien thoai moi, vui long thuc hien:
1. Lien he tong dai 1900 54 54 55, nhan vien se xac nhan danh tinh va cap nhat so dien thoai moi.
2. Hoac gui email den @petrolimex.com.vn voi thong tin: ho ten, ma hop dong, so dien thoai cu, so dien thoai moi.
3. Anh/chá»‹ cung co the den truc tiep van phong voi giay to xac nhan danh tinh.
